failure_modes.mode: Thermal runaway from hot spot formation
failure_modes.cause: Poor heat transfer at ultra-low flow rate (0.0976 mL/min) creates temperature gradients in 19m coil
failure_modes.mitigation: Install multiple temperature sensors along coil length; implement emergency cooling protocol

failure_modes.cause: Pump failure or line blockage at extremely low flow rate with high viscosity DMF at 150°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Install redundant flow monitoring; use pulsation dampener to maintain steady flow

failure_modes.cause: Long residence time (152.9 min) allows thermal cycling and potential valve seat degradation
failure_modes.mitigation: Use dual BPR configuration with pressure monitoring between valves

single_points_of_failure: Single pump at ultra-low flow rate
validation_experiments: Run DMF blank at 0.0976 mL/min for 200 min; monitor temperature profile every 2m along coil
Test pump stability at target flow rate for 8 hours; measure flow deviation < 2%
Validate BPR pressure stability over 4-hour thermal cycling between 25-150°C
